channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump speaks after hours-long delay for Freedom 250 event due to severe weather
item.description: President Trump spoke in Washington, D.C., at the "Salute to America" Freedom 250 event on the Fourth of July. He highlighted veterans, the Artemis II...

item.title: Massive funeral for slain supreme leader enters second day
item.description: The multi-day funeral for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, killed in February by U.S.-Israeli strikes, has featured calls for revenge.

item.title: Trump touts American "golden age", attacks communism in July 4th speech
item.description: In a speech delayed by a two-hour evacuation of the National Mall due to severe weather, President Trump mixed politics with history.

item.title: Weather woes impact July 4th celebrations as National Mall briefly evacuated
item.description: Americans celebrated 250 years of independence this Fourth of July, although severe weather disrupted events in several regions.
